rationale: Entity-name blank at the top of the body. Domestic-Maine filing → entity.name (per schema-gaps/2026-04-30-entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md).

label_verbatim: THIRD: The effective date of the certificate of excuse (if other than the date of filing of the certificate of excuse):
rationale: Optional THIRD-paragraph effective date — used only when the filer wants the excuse to take effect on a date OTHER than the filing date. Follows the same future_effective_date pattern as merger.future_effective_date (MBCA-10) and conversion.future_effective_date (MBCA-21). Filler engine: leave blank when caller wants effective-on-filing-date semantics.
Date of signature on the page-0 signature row (left side, narrow rect x≈75–193, y≈311–333). The paired '*By' signature line on the right side at y≈~310 is wet-ink-only and not AcroForm-bound.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the signing officer or clerk. Shape D (combined name+capacity in one widget) — same convention as MBCA-11 / MBCA-14A / MLLC-12. The footnote restricts the signer to 'any duly authorized officer OR the clerk' per 13-C MRSA §121.5; the schema doesn't enforce that restriction (caller responsibility).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 1
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1. This template uses the field-id 'Name of entitys on the submitted filings 1' (typo preserved upstream) rather than the more-common 'Name of entity' alias seen on most other SOS forms.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'. Field-id alias 'Check Box1' rather than the more-common 'Check Box14' — this template renumbers from 1 because the body has no /Btn widgets.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'. Field-id alias 'Check Box2' rather than 'Check Box15'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'. Field-id alias 'Check Box3' rather than 'Check Box16'.

rationale: Annual-report reminder email — distinct from filing.contact.email per the cover-letter primitive.
